description_long: This sculpture depicts a standing male figure with a muscular, athletic build, rendered in a metallic finish that transitions from gold on the upper body to a darker bronze on the lower body. The figure is shirtless, with well-defined chest and abdominal muscles, and is positioned with one arm bent at the elbow and the other relaxed by the side. The facial features are detailed, with short hair and a focused expression. The figure stands on a rectangular plinth, which provides stability and elevates the sculpture. The surface is highly polished, giving it a glossy, reflective appearance. The overall style is realistic, emphasizing anatomical accuracy and strength.
description: A realistic metallic sculpture of a muscular male figure, transitioning from gold to bronze, standing on a rectangular plinth with a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed chest, abs, and facial features, with the right arm bent and the left arm relaxed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the bent right arm, and the muscular torso.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, the gold-to-bronze color transition, and the stance on the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, the relaxed left arm, and the leg positioning.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
